vulnerabilities.title: Session fixation vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Requests before 2.20.0 sends cookies in redirects to different hosts.

vulnerabilities.title: Arbitrary code execution
vulnerabilities.description: PyYAML before 5.4 is vulnerable to arbitrary code execution via yaml.load().

vulnerabilities.title: Buffer overflow in Convert
vulnerabilities.description: Pillow before 8.2.0 has a buffer overflow in Convert.c.

vulnerabilities.title: Hypothetical vuln in unused package
vulnerabilities.description: This package is not imported anywhere.
